summary_lines: 今天识别到 2 条资源/产业约束线，先看它们是否改变供给、通道、技术或结算筹码。
最先看：能源/通道约束｜这件事改变的是供给、运输通道还是风险溢价？
固定五问：谁被卡、谁拿筹码、钱在办什么事、价格有没有确认、是否触发你的纪律。
中长期纪律：这只是研究框架，先升级观察和确认条件，不自动给买卖指令。
framework_lines: 谁被卡：供给、技术、运输、结算或政策许可，到底哪个环节变成瓶颈。
谁拿筹码：扩产、库存、长协、替代路线或出口限制，是否改变谈判能力。
钱在办什么事：是追求利润、保供、换时间，还是给产业链兜底。
价格有没有确认：油气、黄金、美元、利率、VIX和相关ETF是否同步验证。
操作纪律：先升级观察和等待触发，不把叙事直接变成买入/卖出。

rows.title: Oil price jumps to $115 after reports of 'extended' Iran blockade
rows.question: 这件事改变的是供给、运输通道还是风险溢价？
rows.constraint: 先看油气和航运价格是否确认，再看电力、煤炭、化工、航空和通胀链条。
rows.game_read: 能源不是单纯商品价格，它常常是谈判和制裁的杠杆，价格会先反映供给安全边界。
rows.confirm: 确认WTI/Brent、天然气、运价、库存、OPEC口径和通胀预期是否同向。
rows.portfolio_note: 对你这种中长期组合，先升级能源链观察；不把单日油价波动当成换仓理由。
rows.price_check: 价格确认看：WTI原油 +3.46% 上涨；布伦特原油 -2.69% 下跌；黄金 -0.70% 下跌；美元指数 +0.16% 震荡。

strategic_lens.disclaimer: 资源博弈视角用于理解产业约束和筹码变化，不构成投资建议，也不保证盈利。

summary_lines: 今天生成 3 张发酵预警卡，只提示可能的主线和验证条件。
最先盯：政策压价/格局行业｜立即-1个季度｜置信度 中。
预测不是交易指令；至少等政策/订单/价格/相对强弱中两项确认。
framework_lines: 左侧线索：先找约束变化，不等所有人都确认后再追。
预测对象：只预测可能发酵的主线和验证条件，不预测必涨必跌。
验证顺序：政策/订单/产能/价格/相对强弱，至少两项同向才升级。
失效条件：如果核心约束被解除，或价格不确认，就降级观察。
组合纪律：预测卡片只提醒你看什么，不直接替你买卖。

cards.title: Why has the UAE left Opec - and why does this matter?
cards.label: 政策压价/格局行业
cards.prediction: 有些行业看起来成本上涨、海外涨价，但利润可能被政策压价或保供任务吃掉。
cards.why: 当行业承担民生、农业、运输或保供任务时，价格传导不一定完整；商品涨价不等于相关资产一定受益。
cards.verify: 看官方定价/限价、出口限制、补贴兑现、库存、企业毛利率和现金流。
cards.invalidate: 如果政策允许涨价、补贴覆盖成本，或出口限制解除，行业利润弹性重新上修。
cards.discipline: 这是负面过滤器：先排除“该涨但不能涨”的行业，避免被表面涨价误导。
cards.market_check: 价格验证：WTI原油 +3.46% 上涨；布伦特原油 -2.69% 下跌；美元指数 +0.16% 震荡；美国10Y国债收益率 +0.41% 上涨。

cards.title: Trump threatens Iran with AI picture of himself with a gun: 'No more Mr. Nice guy!'
cards.label: 六氟化钨/WF6：半导体前驱体卡点
cards.prediction: 如果WF6高纯产能、出口规则和先进存储/逻辑需求同时收紧，电子特气可能从小品种变成半导体卡点主线。
cards.why: 它的总市场规模不大，但若不可替代且停线成本远高于材料成本，价格上行和长协重定价会更容易传导给下游。
cards.verify: 看WF6报价和交期、钨/氟原料、出口管制、客户认证、长协价格、库存周数、龙头产能爬坡和毛利率。
cards.invalidate: 如果客户库存充足、替代工艺可行、海外产能快速补上，或新增产能无需认证直接放量，这条线降级。
cards.discipline: 只把它放入电子特气/半导体材料观察；至少等价格、订单、毛利率或客户认证两项确认。
cards.market_check: 价格验证：美元指数 +0.16% 震荡；美国10Y国债收益率 +0.41% 上涨；VIX +1.18% 上涨；标普500期货 +0.00% 震荡。

cards.title: Oil price jumps to $115 after reports of 'extended' Iran blockade
cards.label: 右侧拥挤/普通人劣势
cards.prediction: 当好消息已经变成大众确定性，普通投资者通常很难拿到真正便宜的筹码。
cards.why: 资金、信息和准入有层级；等所有人都看见右侧，优势资金可能已经完成抢筹或抬价。
cards.verify: 看成交放量、估值分位、融资/杠杆、情绪指标、政策放松后是否被快速抢筹。
cards.invalidate: 如果价格仍低、成交未放量、政策还未被充分交易，仍可保持观察。
cards.discipline: 这是追高刹车：系统应提前建观察线，右侧确认后只做纪律复核，不盲目补仓。
cards.market_check: 价格验证：美国10Y国债收益率 +0.41% 上涨；VIX +1.18% 上涨；标普500期货 +0.00% 震荡；纳斯达克100期货 +0.26% 震荡。

prediction_lens.disclaimer: 发酵预警是研究辅助，不构成投资建议，不保证准确或盈利。

whatshappeni.title_zh: 今日股市：道琼斯指数期货下跌，纳斯达克指数在鲍威尔作为美联储主席发表最后一次讲话之前上涨——罗宾汉、星巴克、Alphabet 聚焦（已更新）
whatshappeni.summary_zh: 在美联储利率决定和杰罗姆·鲍威尔担任美联储主席的最后一次新闻发布会之前，美国股指期货周三上涨。市场定价的利率不变的可能性为 100%。主要科技公司的主要盈利报告以及 Booking Holdings、Robinhood 和星巴克喜忧参半的业绩主导了市场焦点，而原油价格在地缘政治紧张局势中攀升。

articles.title: Loss of Emirates Further Weakens OPEC’s Influence
articles.summary: The exit of the United Arab Emirates is the most significant in a series of departures from the oil cartel in recent years.
articles.content: The exit of the United Arab Emirates is the most significant in a series of departures from the oil cartel in recent years.

articles.title: United Arab Emirates to quit oil cartel Opec
articles.summary: The UAE's decision, after nearly 60 years of membership, is seen as a potential death knell for the oil cartel.
articles.content: The UAE's decision, after nearly 60 years of membership, is seen as a potential death knell for the oil cartel.

articles.title: UAE quits Opec in win for Trump as oil cartel weakened
articles.summary: US president has accused organisation of ‘ripping off the rest of the world’ by inflating oil prices The United Arab Emirates has quit the Opec oil cartel after 60 years of membership, in a heavy blow to the group and its de facto leader, Saudi Arabia, as global energy markets contend with the biggest supply crisis in history. The shock loss of the UAE, Opec’s third-largest oil producer, is expected to weaken the group, which for decades has worked together to use its collective oil production to influence global oil market prices. Continue reading...
articles.content: US president has accused organisation of ‘ripping off the rest of the world’ by inflating oil prices The United Arab Emirates has quit the Opec oil cartel after 60 years of membership, in a heavy blow to the group and its de facto leader, Saudi Arabia, as global energy markets contend with the biggest supply crisis in history. The shock loss of the UAE, Opec’s third-largest oil producer, is expected to weaken the group, which for decades has worked together to use its collective oil production to influence global oil market prices. Continue reading...

representative.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Futures Drop, Nasdaq Gains Ahead Of Powell's Last Speech As Fed Chair— Robinhood, Starbucks, Alphabet In Focus (UPDATED)
representative.summary: U.S. stock futures rose on Wednesday ahead of the Federal Reserve's interest rate decision and Jerome Powell's final press conference as Fed Chair. Markets are pricing in a 100% likelihood of unchanged rates. Key earnings reports from major tech companies and mixed results from Booking Holdings, Robinhood, and Starbucks dominated market focus, while crude oil prices climbed amid geopolitical tensions.

representative.title: U.S. Gas Prices Climb Further as Effects of Iran War Reverberate
representative.summary: The national average price of a gallon of gasoline hit $4.23, following oil prices upward as supplies from the Middle East remain disrupted.
representative.content: The national average price of a gallon of gasoline hit $4.23, following oil prices upward as supplies from the Middle East remain disrupted.

active_items.title: 广义成长科技暴露触及上限
active_items.action: 新增资金优先回流宽基、红利低波或黄金，不继续堆成长仓。

active_items.title: 直接 AI 暴露触及上限
active_items.action: 停止新增同类 AI/半导体/港股科技，优先复核重叠和单仓上限。

active_items.title: 黄金仓位低于保险仓下限
active_items.action: 复核是否需要把新增资金的一部分补回黄金保险仓；仍需看价格、溢价和组合整体仓位。

active_items.title: 黄金仓位高于保险仓上限
active_items.action: 提醒不要把黄金当收益主攻；如继续上冲，优先复核是否只保留保险仓功能。

active_items.title: 黄金期货单日大涨
active_items.action: 只做保险仓复核，不追高；看美元指数和美债收益率是否同步支持。

active_items.title: 黄金期货单日大跌
active_items.action: 先确认是否是美元/实际利率驱动；如黄金仓位低于目标区间，再考虑是否分批补保险仓。
